hints.title: Which function is wrong?
hints.content: The failing tests are all `apply_discount` cases; `add_tax` and `cart_total` pass. Focus only on `apply_discount`.

hints.title: What does `percent` mean here?
hints.content: `percent` is a whole number: 20 means 20%, i.e. the fraction 20/100 = 0.2. Trace `apply_discount(100, 20)` by hand with the current code — you'll get 100 - 100*20 = -1900, which matches the bug report.

hints.title: Convert the percentage to a fraction
hints.content: A percentage has to be divided by 100 before it's multiplied into the price. The discount amount is `price * (percent / 100)`.

hints.title: Solution outline
